description_long: This is a freestanding, A-frame advertising board constructed primarily from wood, with a weathered and rustic appearance. The front panel features a hand-painted sign with the words 'Freshly Squeezed ORANGE JUICE Available Here' in colorful, slightly faded lettering, set against a blue, vertically-planked wooden background. The reverse side of the board is plain, showing only the aged, painted wood surface without any visible text or graphics. The frame is composed of thick, rounded wooden beams, providing stability and a sturdy look, with a horizontal support bar connecting the two sides. The board's surface shows signs of wear, with some discoloration and roughness, suggesting outdoor use. Overall, the object is designed to attract attention from passersby in a casual, urban setting.
description: A rustic, wooden A-frame advertising board with a hand-painted sign for freshly squeezed orange juice on a weathered blue background. The frame is thick and sturdy, with visible signs of outdoor wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the A-frame structure and thick, rounded wooden beams with a visible horizontal support bar.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the hand-painted 'Freshly Squeezed ORANGE JUICE Available Here' sign on a blue, vertically-planked wooden panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the A-frame shape and support bar.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, weathered wooden panel with no visible text or graphics.
attribute_frame_design: thick wooden border with rounded edges
attribute_advertisement_content: hand-painted sign for freshly squeezed orange juice
